title: lactuca deltoidea var. gorganica
intro: Lactuca deltoidea var. gorganica, also known as Gorgan lettuce, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae), native to Iran and other parts of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lactuca deltoidea var. gorganica include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
